title: Roulette
_payout_note: Single outer ring of 37 baked wedges (canonical European wheel order, pre-coloured red/black/green via tools/generate_roulette_icons.py); huge central hub spins with the rings on every disperse-nudge. Per-player two-dimensional ownership: white-coin team owns RED + EVEN, black-coin team owns BLACK + ODD. Both-match jackpot 2×, single-dimension match 1× even-money, neither/green forfeit.
_rtp_note: Per-team RTP = 97.3% (house edge 2.7% — identical to real European roulette). 8/37 both, 10/37 colour-only, 10/37 parity-only, 8/37 neither, 1/37 green ⇒ (2·8 + 10 + 10)/37 = 36/37.
_hub_note: Hub takes the central area; the numbered ring is a moderate outer band — wide enough for the fret-framed pocket plus the ball-track strip, narrow enough that the segments don't read as stretched wedges. Disperse-nudge spins hub + rim together so coins on the central face fling outward too.
_wheel_order_note: Canonical European single-zero wheel layout, clockwise from 0. Wedge colours ship baked into the PNGs.
_pattern_note: Generic two-dimension team-ownership match. dim_a = colour bet (white team owns the red set), dim_b = parity bet (white team owns the even set). Other roulette variants (American wheel, Mini-Roulette) drop in by overriding the segment lists; black-team ownership is implicit (the complement of each set, excluding fallback_segment).
